titleStmt.title: Abridged Version of the Tārika Walda ʾAmid (Beta-recension)
Abridged Version of the Tārika Walda ʾAmid (β-recension)

publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

availability.licence: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

abstract.p: Abridged version of the Tārika Walda ʾAmid (β-recension), containing only the pre-Islamic history, with a number of passages on the Alexandrinian patriarchs in the chapters on Nero onwards.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

revisionDesc.change: Corrections after reviews by Dorothea Reule and Nafisa Valieva

bibl.title: Ethiopic Palimpsests
Palimpsests and Related Phenomena across Languages and Cultures
Studies in Manuscript Cultures
Das geographische Traktat in der Weltgeschichte des Wäldä Amid: Text, Übersetzung und Kommentar
Das geographische Traktat in der Weltgeschichte des Wäldä Amid: Text, Übersetzung und Kommentar
bibl.note: Edition of the geographical treatise in the story of Eber (15th generation).

bibl.title: Das geographische Traktat in der Weltgeschichte des Wäldä Amid: Text, Übersetzung und Kommentar
bibl.note: Translation of the geographical treatise (15th generation), translated to German.

div.note: The following textparts and division is taken from Berlin, Berlin State Library, Petermann II Nachtrag 24.

div.label: Attribution to the author by the translator.
div.q: በስመ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ መስተ፡ ሣህል፡ ንጽሕፍ፡ መጽሐፈ፡ ታሪክ፡ ዘአስተጋብአ፡ ጊዮርጊስ፡ ወልደ፡ አሚድ፡

div.label: Summary on the creation
div.q: ይቤ፡ ከመ፡ ቃለ፡ ኦሪት፡ በዕለተ፡ እኁድ፡ ፈጠረ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ፰ ስርተ፡ ፬ ጠቢብ፡ ወ፯ በአርምሞ። ወበዕለተ፡ ሳብዕት፡ አዕረፈ። እግዚአብሔር፡ እምኵሉ፡ ግብሩ።

div.label: The pre-Islamic history from Adam to Heraclius.
1st Generation - Adam
div.q: ወወለዶ፡ አዳም፡ ቃያልሃ፡ ወአቤልሃ፡ ወሞተ፡ አዳም፡ በ፱፻ ወ፴፡ ሊተሃ፡ ዓመት፡ በመዋዕሊሁ።

div.label: 2nd Generation - Seth
div.q: ሒሴት፡ ሐሕይወ፡ ፪፻ወ፭ ዓ፡ ወወለዶ፡ ለሄኖስ።

div.label: 3rd Generation - Enosh
div.q: ሂአኖ፡ መገቦሙ፡ ለሕዝቡ፡ ወኮበ፡ ኮኖ፡ ፻፱፻፡ ወወለዶ፡ ለቃይናን፡

div.label: 4th Generation - Kenan
div.q: ፬። ቃይናን፡ ሐሕይወ፡ ፻ወ፸፡ ዓ፡ ወወለዶ፡ ለመላልኢል፡

div.label: 5th Generation - Mahalalel
div.q: መላልኤል፡፷፭፻ ሐሕይወ፡ ፻ወ፷ወ፭፡ ዓ፡ ወወለዶ፡ ለያሬድ።

div.label: 6th Generation - Jared
div.q: ያሬድ፡ ፯ ሐሕይወ። ፻፷ወ፭። ዓመ፡ ወወለዶ፡ ለሂኖስ።

div.label: 7th Generation - Enoch
div.q: ሂኖክ ፯ መገቦሙ፡ ለሕዝቡ፡ ወባም፻፷፭ ዓ።

div.label: 8th Generation - Methuselah
div.q: ማቱሳላ፰ ሐሕይወ፡ ፻፹ወ፪ ዓ፡ ወወልዶ፡ ለላሚኅ።

div.label: 9th Generation - Lamech
div.q: ባሚህ፱ ሐሕይወ፡ ፻፹ወ፪ ዓ፡ ወወልዶ። ወወልዶ፡ ለኖኅ፡

div.label: 10th Generation - Noah
div.q: ኖኅ ሐሕይወ፡ ፬፻፴፬ ዓ፡ ወወለዶ፡ ለሲም፡

div.label: 11th Generation - Shem
div.q: ሴም፲፬ ሐሕ እምድኅረ፡ አይኅ፡ ፪፻፡ ዓ ወወልዶ፡ ለአርፋክስድ፡

div.label: The seven climes and their inhabitants
Inhabitants of the sixth clime
div.note: Including a description of the Amazons.

div.label: Inhabitants of the regions above the seventh clime
Story of the Ethiopian wife of Moses
78th and 79th Generation - Darius the Mede and Cyrus the Persian
91st Generation - Darius III Codomannus
div.note: On Darius III Codomannus, the last emperor of the Achaemenid Persian Empire.

div.label: Pertinax
div.note: Referred to as Faqitabǝkos in Frankfurt, Universitätsbibliothek Johann Christian Senckenberg, Frankfurt Ms. or. 134.

div.label: Septimius Severus?
div.note: Referred to as Faqitabǝkos in Frankfurt, Universitätsbibliothek Johann Christian Senckenberg, Frankfurt Ms. or. 134.

div.label: Account of the council of Constantinopel
